title: sphaerella pumila
intro: Sphaerella pumila, also known as the dwarf or small round Sphaerella, is a type of plant that belongs to the fungi family and is often found in soil and decaying organic matter. The medicinal properties of Sphaerella pumila include its antifungal and antibacterial properties, which can help combat infections and promote wound healing. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to boost the immune system, reduce inflammation, and exhibit antioxidant properties. Sphaerella pumila can be prepared for herbal use through teas, infusions, and tinctures, although more research is needed to fully understand its potential applications and effects on human health.
